category_title: Low-engagement primary students who prioritize personal autonomy and environmental comfort
scenario_title: Environmental discomfort and noise during reading
minimal_context: The student is directed to sit in a regular chair to complete a reading task in the pullout intervention room.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's get started on our reading task today. Please sit in this regular chair at the table and open your book.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I would prefer to spend more time reading in the blue comfy cushioned chair. These regular chairs are uncomfortable.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to use the regular chairs at the table right now. Please begin reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It is harder to read in here. It is a little bit noisier than the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to concentrate on the reading task.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't concentrate because it's not as comfortable as the classroom. The school should install an insulated pod in here so I can have a quiet place to read.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's get started on our reading task today. Please sit in this regular chair at the table and open your book.

STUDENT: I would prefer to spend more time reading in the blue comfy cushioned chair. These regular chairs are uncomfortable.

TUTOR: We need to use the regular chairs at the table right now. Please begin reading.

STUDENT: It is harder to read in here. It is a little bit noisier than the classroom.

TUTOR: Just try your best to concentrate on the reading task.

STUDENT: I can't concentrate because it's not as comfortable as the classroom. The school should install an insulated pod in here so I can have a quiet place to read.
